hero.badge_2: Certified Pool Operators on Every Visit
hero.headline:
Premium Pool Care at Prices
You Deserve
hero.subheadline: You bought the pool for the memories, not the maintenance headaches. Captains Pool Care handles every detail so all you do is enjoy crystal-clear water. Certified technicians, honest pricing, and proof-of-service photos after every visit.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">Certified Professionals
services.subtitle: Every technician is a Certified Pool Operator who treats your pool like their own. From weekly maintenance to equipment repairs, we deliver uncommon results with honest pricing.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance (Captain's Plan)
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning, water balancing, chemical treatment, and complimentary chemicals. Your pool stays pristine year-round with zero effort on your part.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Professional skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and basket emptying. We restore and maintain crystal-clear water regardless of your pool's size or current condition.

cards.title: Chemical Balancing
cards.description: Precision water testing and expert chemical adjustment. Your pool stays safe, comfortable, and gentle on skin with perfectly balanced chemistry every week.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems diagnosed and fixed by certified technicians. Fast turnaround with upfront pricing and no surprise charges.

cards.title: Opening & Winterization
cards.description: Seasonal preparation to get your pool swim-ready for summer or properly protected through Georgia's cooler months. Full equipment inspection included.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: Tailored maintenance plans for apartment complexes, hotels, HOA communities, and Airbnb properties. Consistent quality your residents and guests notice.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Captain-Grade Pool

steps.title: Get Your Instant Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and get transparent pricing within minutes. No haggling, no hidden fees, and absolutely no hard-sell tactics.

steps.title: We Deploy Certified Techs
steps.description: Our background-checked, CPO-certified technicians arrive on schedule. You receive before-and-after photos and a full service report after every visit.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every day. We treat it like our own, so all you do is make memories with family and friends.

about.label: Why Atlanta Trusts the Captain
about.headline: 30 Years of Business Excellence, Now Focused on Your Pool
about.description: Captains Pool Care was born from frustration. After years of disappointing pool services, our founder Miguel brought 30 years of entrepreneurial expertise to an industry that desperately needed higher standards. Every technician is a Certified Pool Operator who has passed a criminal background check. We provide proof-of-service reports with before-and-after photos because we believe transparency builds trust.

features.title: Background-Checked CPO Technicians
features.description: Every technician is a Certified Pool Operator who has passed a comprehensive criminal background check before entering your property.

features.title: Proof-of-Service Photo Reports
features.description: After every visit, you receive before-and-after photos and a detailed report. You always know exactly what was done and why.

features.title: Instant Pricing, No Hidden Fees
features.description: Get your quote upfront with full transparency. No surprise charges, no upselling, no bait-and-switch tactics. Just honest pricing.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get your instant quote with everything included upfront. No hidden fees, no contracts, no bait-and-switch.

guarantee.headline: Our "Captain's Honor" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, we will return and make it right at no additional cost. We treat your pool as if it were our own, and we stand behind every single visit with our reputation. That is our promise to every customer.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days across the Greater Atlanta area. For urgent situations, we offer expedited service. Just call us at (470) 264-0075 and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified and vetted?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every technician is a Certified Pool Operator (CPO) who has passed a thorough criminal background check. We also carry full general liability and workers compensation insurance for your protection.

faqs.question: What is the Captain's Plan weekly maintenance?
faqs.answer: Our signature weekly service includes complete cleaning, water testing and chemical balancing, filter maintenance, and complimentary chemicals based on typical usage. You receive a proof-of-service report with before-and-after photos after every visit.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide specialized pool maintenance for apartment complexes, hotels, HOA communities, and Airbnb properties throughout the Atlanta metro area. Each commercial client gets a tailored service plan.

faqs.question: How does your pricing work?
faqs.answer: We provide instant, transparent pricing with no hidden charges. You see exactly what you are paying for before we start. No contracts, no cancellation fees, and no surprise add-ons. We believe in earning your trust every single visit.

testimonials.name: Nancy P.
testimonials.text: Captains Pool Care is simply outstanding! This is by far the best pool service company we worked with. The team is professional, cordial, and the pool maintenance quality is excellent.

testimonials.name: Airbnb Property Owner
testimonials.text: I am using Captain's Pool Services for all of our Airbnb homes, and I am absolutely thrilled with the service! From start to finish, the team is very professional, punctual, and incredibly thorough. Our pools have never looked better!

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Captains Pool Care was prompt, knowledgeable, friendly, and offered my husband and I great customer service. I cannot say enough good things about this company!
